problem id: fa67da07
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2)

examples:
  10000011 -> 00001110
  10101010 -> 10101010
  01011010 -> 01101001
  10001100 -> 00110010
  00000111 -> 00011100
  00001101 -> 00110100
  10101101 -> 10110110
  11110110 -> 11011011
  01101101 -> 10110101
  10110111 -> 11011110

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 11101011
